title: Wireless Design, Configuration, and Validation · Protocol Clinic: Net Wpa Authentication
summary: Design staff, guest, and point-to-point wireless service across crowded, regulated, and mobile spaces. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net wpa authentication increment in a secure wireless survey and deployment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose WPA2 or WPA3 and PSK or enterprise authentication with migration, certificate, credential, and client constraints.
Choose infrastructure, mesh, ad hoc, and point-to-point wireless topology from backhaul, mobility, scale, and failure needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook

# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
